LAW AND MOTION 301, HEARING ON PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR STAY OF SUSPENSION.PETITIONER DANIEL GREENWOOD'S MOTION FOR TEMPORARY STAY OF DRIVER'S LICENSE SUSPENSION PENDING OUTCOME OF WRIT OF MANDATE, SUBMITTED UPON STIPULATION OF PETITIONER AND RESPONDENT STEVEN GORDON, DIRECTOR OF THE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES, IS GRANTED CONSISTENT WITH THE STIPULATION, INCLUDING THE ID CONDITION, EXCEPT THE DURATION OF THE STAY IS LIMITED TO EIGHT MONTHS OR UNTIL FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT, WHICHEVER OCCURS FIRST. ORDER IS SIGNED.JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (301/JMQ)

calendar.matters: Joint Notice Of Merit Hearing On Petitioner S Petition For Writ Of Mandate

Joint Notice Of Merit Hearing On Petitioner S Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jun-05-2026 Continued To Jun-23-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT STEVEN GORDON DIRECTOR FOR THE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES FOR THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Joint Notice Of Merit Hearing On Petitioner S Petition For Writ Of Mandate.

Continued to June 23, 2026. All parties to provide courtesy copies of their filings in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B by June 16, 2026. Movant shall also provide a hard courtesy copy of the administrative record. Please attach a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Joint Notice Of Merit Hearing On Petitioner S Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar May-12-2026 Continued To Jun-05-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT STEVEN GORDON's, DIRECTOR FOR THE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES FOR THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, Joint Notice Of Merit Hearing On Petitioner's Petition For Writ Of Mandate.

Per order of the Presiding Judge, the motion is transferred to be heard in Department 302 in front of Judge Quinn on June 5, 2026. Judge Van Aken is recused.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Joint Notice Of Merit Hearing On Petitioner'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Mar-19-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT STEVEN GORDON DIRECTOR FOR THE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES FOR THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Joint Notice Of Merit Hearing On Petitioner'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar without prejudice to being re-noticed for a hearing at least ten court days after delivery of courtesy copies of all papers filed in support and in opposition to the petition and a stipulation identifying the administrative record or, if there is no administrative record, identifying the documents and other materials which the court is requested to consider in ruling on the petition. Neither side complied with the local rule requiring delivery of courtesy copies to department 301 and must do so at least ten court days in advance of the new hearing date.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/HEK)

HEARING ON PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR STAY OF SUSPENSION

Off Calendar Jan-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

HEARING ON PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR STAY OF SUSPENSION.

Petitioner Daniel Greenwood's Motion for Temporary Stay of Driver's License Suspension Pending Outcome of Writ of Mandate, submitted upon stipulation of Petitioner and Respondent Steven Gordon, Director of the Department of Motor Vehicles, is GRANTED consistent with the stipulation, including the ID condition, except the duration of the stay is limited to eight months or until further order of the court, whichever occurs first.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
